meta.tagline: A high-velocity, data-driven gifting network — built on viral mechanics and fintech-grade economics.

hero.headline: The gifting platform that turns a family's love into a compounding asset.
hero.subhead: Consumer-grade delight on the front. Fintech-grade economics underneath.

items.label: UK Open Banking users — rails are mature
people pulled in per Fire (target K-loop)

opportunity.headline: The Problem Is Universal. The Solution Has Never Existed.
opportunity.subheadline: Billions are spent on gifts nobody wanted, by people who felt obliged to guess.

stats.caption: spent on unwanted gifts in the UK each year
of UK adults feel stressed buying gifts
more household waste in December alone

whyNow.title: Open Banking Is Mature
whyNow.body: Account-to-account payments are now fast, trusted, and a fraction of card cost. We are built on these rails from day one — a structural margin advantage over anyone still routing through Visa and Mastercard.

whyNow.title: AI Unlocked a New Emotion
whyNow.body: A personalised reveal moment cost a fortune two years ago. Today it costs pennies and creates something people genuinely share. That shareability is our distribution.

whyNow.title: The Market Is Wide Open
whyNow.body: There is no dominant consumer group-gifting product in the UK. Existing tools are clunky (PayPal pools), B2B-only, or charity-shaped (GoFundMe). The everyday gifting moment is unowned.

mechanism.headline: Three Mechanics, One Compounding Machine
mechanism.subheadline: Growth, revenue, and cost advantage are not three problems. They are one design.

pillars.title: The 1-in-6 Viral Loop
pillars.body: Every Fire is a distribution event. One host invites ~6 contributors; roughly one in six goes on to start their own Fire. Growth is built into the product, not bought with ad spend — so the curve compounds instead of decaying.

pillars.title: Data-Driven Intent Revenue
pillars.body: When someone adds a wishlist item, they declare exactly what they want to buy — category, brand, price point — before any money moves. It is the most valuable signal in commerce, and we capture it as a by-product of a delightful consumer experience.

pillars.title: Low-Overhead Architecture
pillars.body: Open Banking rails, serverless infrastructure, and AI-generated content mean the cost to serve each user is tiny and falls with scale. The business is engineered to reach profitability without a heavy operational footprint.

jointFires.label: Joint Fires
jointFires.title: The 3-Year Compound Effect
jointFires.body: Two people linking their gifting potential turns scattered, single-occasion spend into a funded Major Goal. Pooled across three years, every birthday, Christmas and anniversary stacks — lifting conversion on high-ticket items and locking both networks into the loop.

stat.label: conversion on high-ticket goals when two partners pool over 3 years

jointFires.caption: Modelled: two partners, three occasions a year, 10% momentum. A solo pot never reaches the high-ticket goal — a Joint Fire does.

valueEngine.headline: The Value Engine
valueEngine.subheadline: We make money while actively rewarding the user. That alignment is the moat.

fairness.title: No-Fee Withdrawals — The Fairness Strategy
fairness.body: Cashing a Fire out to a bank account is always free. No exit fee, no trap. That builds the one thing a money product cannot fake: trust.
fairness.lockedLoop: The incentive is positive, not punitive. Withdraw and you keep 100%. But convert your Fire into a partner gift card and you unlock a Bonus on top — so the user is rewarded for keeping value inside the loop, where it generates affiliate revenue and recirculates.
points: Withdraw to bank: 100% of the balance, zero fee, builds trust.
Convert to a partner gift card: balance + a cashback Bonus.
The 'Locked-In Loop': value that stays in the ecosystem compounds for both the user and the platform.

cashbackMath.title: The Cashback Math
cashbackMath.intro: A retailer pays an affiliate commission when a Fire converts into a real purchase. We split it so the user is rewarded and the platform profits from the same transaction.
cashbackMath.takeaway: The user feels rewarded, the retailer gets a verified buyer, and Kindled earns — all from money that was going to be spent anyway.

revenueModels.title: Affiliate Commissions
revenueModels.body: Every funded Fire that converts into a real purchase earns a retailer commission. The catalogue is curated; sponsored placement is auctioned. Revenue scales directly with happy outcomes.

revenueModels.title: Intent Data Licensing
revenueModels.body: Anonymised, category-level purchase-intent — declared before the spend — is the highest-value signal in retail. We package it as a licensed feed for brands and programmatic buyers. High margin, near-zero marginal cost.

revenueModels.title: Premium AI Reveals
revenueModels.body: The reveal is the emotional peak and the distribution engine. A premium tier — bespoke cinematic videos, branded moments, keepsakes — monetises the highest-intent, highest-emotion moment on the platform.

edge.headline: The Competitive Edge
edge.subheadline: We don't just hold the data — we hand its value back to the user, and that keeps them coming.

smartShopper.title: The 'Smart Shopper' Hook
smartShopper.body: We track the live price of every item on a wishlist. When a Ninja air fryer that's been sitting in a Fire drops £20 at a partner retailer, we ping the givers: 'The thing they want just got cheaper — fund it now.'
smartShopper.effect: It converts contributions at the exact moment of best value, and positions Kindled as the family's advocate, not just a checkout.

dataBack.title: The 'Data-Back' Guarantee
dataBack.body: Because we can see aggregate demand — what thousands of families want, and the price they'll pay — we use that collective leverage to secure the best possible price for the user.
dataBack.effect: The data asset works for the customer first. That's what earns the right to license it second.

unitEconomics.title: Unit Economics — Why the Rails Matter
unitEconomics.subtitle: Modelled per £100 contributed to a Fire
unitEconomics.takeaway: ~97% lower processing cost and instant settlement. At scale, the rail choice alone is the difference between thin and structural margin.

flywheel.headline: Why Kindled Compounds
flywheel.subheadline: Every reveal is a free advert. Every giver is a future host. The loop turns itself.

loop.title: A host lights a Fire
loop.body: Someone sets up a pot for a birthday, baby shower or Christmas — in 90 seconds, for free.

loop.title: They rally ~6 people
loop.body: One share in the family chat pulls an average of six contributors onto the platform.

loop.title: Givers chip in
loop.body: Each pays via Open Banking in seconds — and quietly declares exactly what they'd love too.

loop.title: The reveal goes off
loop.body: A cinematic, shareable moment. People screenshot it. It reaches new faces at zero ad spend.

loop.title: Givers become hosts
loop.body: Around 1 in 6 starts their own Fire — and the loop begins again, bigger each turn.

multiplier.label: people per Fire — every one a future host

compounding.label: What one Fire becomes
compounding.caption: Three turns of the loop from a single Fire. No paid acquisition — the product is the marketing.

risk.headline: Risk, Mitigated by Design
risk.subheadline: We've engineered the three failure modes out of the product, not papered over them.

items.title: Frictionless Flow
items.risk: Payment and sign-up friction is where consumer products die.
items.mitigation: No app and no account for givers — a link opens, Open Banking confirms in seconds, no card details typed. The host onboards once. Every step that could lose a user has been removed.

items.title: AI Quality — No Uncanny Valley
items.risk: A cheap or creepy reveal would poison the emotional core.
items.mitigation: Reveals run on curated, brand-controlled templates with quality gates, and always fall back to a polished generated motion experience. We ship 'tasteful and shareable', never 'almost human'.

items.title: Fintech Trust
items.risk: Families won't put money near a name they don't trust.
items.mitigation: Regulated Open Banking rails via FCA-authorised providers, free withdrawals, a transparent ledger, and funds never held longer than needed. Trust is the product, and it's designed in.

operator.headline: The Operator Mindset
operator.subheadline: How we'll actually win: measure the loop, ship fast, and engineer the moment people share.

principles.title: K-Factor Obsession
principles.body: Every feature is judged by one question: does it move the viral coefficient? Invites sent × conversion rate is the metric that compounds, and it's the metric we manage to.

principles.title: Iterative by Default
principles.body: Ship small, measure the loop, double down on what compounds and kill what doesn't. The roadmap is a set of bets on K-factor and revenue-per-Fire, not a feature checklist.

principles.title: Engineer the Social Moment
principles.body: The AI reveal is deliberately built as a high-dopamine peak — the screenshot-worthy second that makes someone want this for someone they love. That single moment is our cheapest, highest-converting channel.

roadmap.headline: Execution in Phases. Compounding by Design.
roadmap.subheadline: Each phase unlocks the next. Every milestone has a clear strategic purpose.

milestones.title: Core Product + Viral Instrumentation
milestones.why: Nothing compounds until the loop works end-to-end and we can measure the 1-in-6 conversion in practice.

milestones.title: Intent Data + Fee Engine
milestones.why: Lock in the structural cost advantage and start the clock on 12 months of clean, exportable intent data for Phase 2.

milestones.title: AI Reveal GA + Cashback Catalogue
milestones.why: Turn on the distribution engine and close the cashback loop — contributors earn, spend, and generate more data.

milestones.title: B2B Intent Data Licensing
milestones.why: Activate the high-margin revenue layer Phase 1 quietly built — verified purchase intent as a licensed feed.

milestones.title: Reveal-Window Ads + Enterprise API
milestones.why: Monetise the verified-intent window before the reveal, and open a zero-CAC enterprise channel.

milestones.title: Financial Services Layer
milestones.why: A platform sitting on family money around milestones is the natural home for savings, BNPL contributions, and a cashback card.
